pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; consistent with task workflow
Verified in export_result.sh and task description; contains required keys: title, date, call_number, download_filename, source_url

Task description explicitly states 'typically >20MB' for high-resolution images. Actual WPA poster TIFF files from Library of Congress: 32.2MB-164.4MB (Preserve Wild Life), 69.4MB (Grand Canyon), 69.8MB (Zion). Metadata value is 10x smaller than documented requirement.
Task description: 'download 3 distinct high-resolution WPA National Park posters (e.g., Grand Canyon, Yellowstone, Zion)'
Library of Congress official website domain confirmed as www.loc.gov (base domain: loc.gov); WPA posters available at https://www.loc.gov/pictures/item/[ID]/

privileged_info_summary: The task requires downloading 3 real WPA National Park posters from the Library of Congress (loc.gov). Verified WPA poster examples include 'The National Parks Preserve Wild Life' (32.2-164.4MB), 'Grand Canyon National Park' (69.4MB), and 'Zion National Park' (69.8MB) - all available for public download with no restrictions. Files must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/curated_images/ with metadata in credits.json. CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: Metadata claims minimum file size of 2MB, but task description explicitly requires '>20MB' high-resolution files; actual LOC TIFF files are 32-164MB.
